tool.name: calendar_edit_event
tool.description: Edit an existing Google Calendar event. Search for the event by title, then modify its title, date, or time. At least one field to change must be provided.

parameters.name: event_title
parameters.description: Title of the event to find and edit

parameters.name: new_title
parameters.description: New title for the event (leave empty to keep current)

parameters.name: new_date
parameters.description: New date in YYYY-MM-DD format (leave empty to keep current)

parameters.name: new_time
parameters.description: New start time in HH:MM 24-hour format (leave empty to keep current)
